title: slack-notifier configuration
description: Configuration keys for the slack-notifier community plugin (OpenProject #468).

enabled.description: Master toggle. When false, no scheduling is registered and no HTTP calls are made.

webhook-url.description: Slack incoming-webhook URL. Required. Resolve from an env var (e.g. ${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}); never commit the literal.

channel.description: Optional channel override (e.g. "#integrations"). Most incoming-webhooks ignore this and post to the channel the webhook was created for.

admin-base-url.description: Base URL of the engine's admin API (where /admin/observe/dlq lives).

admin-bearer-token.description: Optional bearer token for the admin API. Resolve from an env var.

max-retries.description: Number of additional attempts after an initial Slack POST failure (5xx).

rules.description: Alerting rules. The DLQ poller evaluates dlq-threshold rules; error-rate is reserved for a future iteration.

name.description: Stable identifier used in cooldown bookkeeping and Slack message footers.

threshold.description: For dlq-threshold: fire when DLQ size > this value.

threshold-percent.description: For error-rate: fire when the failure percentage exceeds this value.

cooldown-seconds.description: After firing, suppress further alerts from this rule for this many seconds.
